---
title: "About"
---

## What this is

A growing collection of worked solutions and pedagogical analyses for the **58th IChO (Uzbekistan, 2026) Preparatory Problems**. The source is plain Markdown / Quarto `.qmd`; the site is rebuilt automatically on every push.

## Scope

The official IChO 2026 Preparatory Problems booklet is split into three parts; this site covers them as follows:

| Part of the booklet | What it contains | Coverage on this site |
|---|---|---|
| **Part 1** | The syllabus — *Fields of Advanced Difficulty* (theoretical + practical), physical constants, formulae, math reference, and the IChO 2026 periodic table. No problems to solve. | **Reproduced for reference** on the [Syllabus](syllabus.qmd) page. |
| **Part 2** | The 30 theoretical problems. | **Primary deliverable** — bilingual worked solutions + 教学点评 pedagogical analysis. Listed on the [Home](index.qmd) dashboard. |
| **Part 3** | Lab practical problems. | **Out of scope.** Refer to the official IChO 2026 Preparatory Problems PDF for these. |

## How to read a solution

Each solution follows a fixed format:

> **Solution (Qn — Topic)**
>
> **Strategy.** One paragraph mapping the *题眼* (key clue) and reasoning chain.
>
> **Step-by-step derivation.** Equations are typeset with KaTeX + `mhchem` so chemical formulas, mechanism arrows, and matrix calculations render as in print.
>
> $$\boxed{\text{final numerical or symbolic answer}}$$

After the solution there may be a **教学点评 / 解题分析** (pedagogical commentary): thesis opener → 题眼 / 推断链 / 板块 body → 经验总结 → ★ difficulty rating.

## How to report an error

The fastest way: hop on Discord and include:

- Problem number (e.g., **P2.07**)
- Question number within the problem (e.g., **Q3.2**)
- The specific step or equation you're commenting on, quoted

Issues are also welcome on the GitHub repo if you prefer.

## Workflow (for the maintainer)

1. Edit `parts/partN/Problem_NN.qmd` locally.
2. `quarto preview` to live-reload while drafting.
3. Update the `status:` field in the frontmatter as the solution matures.
4. `git push` → CI rebuilds and republishes.
